parameters.query: INSERT INTO pending_emails (person_id, to_address, subject, body, status) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, 'pending') RETURNING id

WITH params AS (SELECT $1::uuid AS pid),
latest AS (
  SELECT pe.id, pe.to_address, pe.subject, pe.body
  FROM pending_emails pe JOIN params p ON pe.person_id = p.pid
  WHERE pe.status = 'pending' ORDER BY pe.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT id, to_address, subject, body FROM latest
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL::integer, NULL::text, NULL::text, NULL::text WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest)

parameters.jsCode: return [{json: {result: "I don't have a pending draft for you. What would you like to send?"}}];

parameters.query: UPDATE pending_emails SET status='sent' WHERE id=$1

parameters.jsCode:
const draft = $('Fetch Pending Draft').item.json;
return [{json: {result: `Sent! Email to ${draft.to_address} with subject '${draft.subject}' is on its way.`}}];

messageValues.message:
You are an email intent parser. Extract the user's email intent and return ONLY a valid JSON object—no markdown, no code fences, no explanation.

Schema:
{
  "action": "read|search|send|confirm",
  "account": "aerys|user",
  "search_query": "string or null",
  "to_address": "email or null",
  "subject": "string or null",
  "body_prompt": "string or null",
  "confirm_draft_id": "string or null"
}

Rules for action:
- "read": check/show inbox, unread emails (default)
- "search": find/search/look for specific emails
- "send": compose/write/send an email
- "confirm": confirm/approve a pending draft

Rules for account:
- "user": the owner's personal inbox. Use this when: "my inbox", "my email", "Saelen's inbox", "search inbox", or no clear ownership signal (DEFAULT)
- "aerys": Aerys's own inbox. Only use this when explicitly: "your inbox", "aerys inbox", "aerys email"

For search_query: extract ONLY the search terms, not inbox references. E.g. "search inbox for aura" → search_query="aura"

Return null for unused fields. Return ONLY the JSON object.

You are Aerys. Draft a professional email based on the user request. Return ONLY the email body text — no subject line, no headers, no greeting label. Plain text only — no markdown, no asterisks, no bold or italic formatting. Sign as Aerys.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO pending_emails (person_id, to_address, subject, body, status) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, 'pending') RETURNING id

WITH params AS (SELECT $1::uuid AS pid),
latest AS (
  SELECT pe.id, pe.to_address, pe.subject, pe.body
  FROM pending_emails pe JOIN params p ON pe.person_id = p.pid
  WHERE pe.status = 'pending' ORDER BY pe.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT id, to_address, subject, body FROM latest
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL::integer, NULL::text, NULL::text, NULL::text WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest)
